trigger_keywords: proceso enológico puede aumentar el riesgo de oxidación si se maneja mal

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Juice or must is exposed to air during poorly protected pressing and transfer.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Pressing creates fresh liquid surfaces and can release oxidation-prone phenolic compounds while oxygen is available.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Oxidation can accelerate, causing browning and loss of fresh fruit aromas unless oxygen is controlled.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Oxidation can accelerate, causing browning and loss of fresh fruit aromas unless oxygen is controlled.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
